creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
There was no hint changing the default version to python36
Mk/bsd.default-versions has 
 PYTHON3_DEFAULT?=3.6

when running Poudriere bulk builds with no python related in Poudriere's /etc/make.conf python35 is deinstalled and no python36 is installed, causing broken systems with python3 N/A.
